narration: Selection sort looks for the smallest value in the unsorted part of the array.
callout: The sorted section grows from the left.

narration: After finding the smallest remaining value, selection sort swaps it into the next correct position.
decision: Now the first position is correct.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What is the main job of each round in selection sort?

choices.label: Find the smallest remaining value
choices.feedback: Correct. That smallest value gets placed into the next sorted spot.

choices.label: Find the middle value
choices.feedback: Not this one. Selection sort cares about the next smallest remaining value.

narration: Then the same story repeats for the rest of the unsorted section.
callout: The left side keeps becoming more sorted.
